Author: rail
Name: BeastieBuddy
Description: A searchable list of all mobs and their known locations, using community data. Use /bbuddy to open, or search with /bbuddy <mob_name>.
Punchline: A searchable mob database with spawn locations for Beastmaster, Blue Mage, or hunts
Changelog:
v7.51.1.0: bestiary placeholder added pre-patch, will auto update post patch
v7.51.0.0: search list expanded from 10 to 25, clustered results, click to teleport option
v7.50.1.1: toggle window with  buddy
v7.50.1: api bump+
